Operation 'listCollaborators' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. The current description is too brief and lacks important details about what data is returned. data.current_description: View all editors for a template.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all collaborators with editing access to a specific template. Returns collaborator details including user identifiers and permission levels. Requires the template to exist and the authenticated user to have access to it.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks important details about what data is returned. The suggestion clarifies the return value structure and includes context about prerequisites (template existence and user access), which helps AI agents understand when this operation is appropriate to use.

message: Operation 'addCollaborator' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks specificity about input requirements, return value, and side effects. The improved version clarifies what input is expected (email or user identifier), what is returned (confirmation with permissions), and the side effect (immediate access and notification), enabling AI agents to better understand the operation's full impact.

data.current_description: Grant editing access to a template collaborator.
data.description_suggestion: Grants editing access to a template by adding a new collaborator. Accepts collaborator details (email or user identifier) in the request body. Returns confirmation of the added collaborator with their assigned permissions. The collaborator will immediately gain access to edit the template and receive a notification of the invitation.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks specificity about input requirements, return value, and side effects. The improved version clarifies what input is expected (email or user identifier), what is returned (confirmation with permissions), and the side effect (immediate access and notification), enabling AI agents to better understand the operation's full impact.

message: Operation 'removeCollaborator' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description omits important details about the response and side effects. The improved version specifies the required parameters, clarifies the return value, and explicitly states the side effect (immediate access revocation), which helps AI agents understand the full scope and consequences of this operation.

data.current_description: Revoke template editing permissions for a collaborator.
data.description_suggestion: Revokes editing permissions and removes a collaborator from a template. Requires both the template ID and collaborator ID as path parameters. Returns confirmation of the removal. The collaborator will immediately lose access to the template and can no longer view or edit it.
data.reasoning: The current description omits important details about the response and side effects. The improved version specifies the required parameters, clarifies the return value, and explicitly states the side effect (immediate access revocation), which helps AI agents understand the full scope and consequences of this operation.

data.current_description: Prevent further signing on an active contract.
data.description_suggestion: Prevent further signing on an active contract by withdrawing it. Once withdrawn, signers can no longer sign the contract and no additional signature requests can be sent. Returns confirmation of the withdrawal action. This operation is irreversible.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains the primary effect but lacks details about side effects (signers cannot sign, no new requests can be sent) and the irreversible nature of the action. Enhanced description helps AI agents understand the consequences and determine if this operation matches their intent.

data.current_description: Create a PDF preview of a contract and send download link via webhook.

data.current_description: Dispatch or resend a signature request to a signer.
data.description_suggestion: Send or resend a signature request to a specific signer on a contract. Requires both contract ID and signer ID as path parameters. data.current_description: Modify template content and settings.
data.description_suggestion: Modifies an existing template's content, settings, and placeholder fields. Accepts template ID and UpdateTemplateRequest with desired changes. Note: Updating a template affects all future contracts created from this template, but does not modify existing contracts.

data.current_description: Duplicate a template with customized placeholders.

Added information about partial update support, parameter requirements, response content, and important caveat about impact on future vs. existing contracts for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Modify template content and settings.
data.description_suggestion: Modifies an existing template's content, settings, and placeholder fields. Accepts template ID and UpdateTemplateRequest with desired changes. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated template object. Note: Updating a template affects all future contracts created from this template, but does not modify existing contracts.
data.reasoning: Description lacks detail about what can be modified, whether updates are partial or full, and critical side effects. Added information about partial update support, parameter requirements, response content, and important caveat about impact on future vs. existing contracts for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'copyTemplate' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is vague about what 'customized placeholders' means and what the operation returns. Added clarity about request schema, that a new template ID is generated, and that the copy is independent from the original for better AI agent understanding of the operation's effects.

data.current_description: Duplicate a template with customized placeholders.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a duplicate copy of an existing template with optional customization of placeholder fields. Accepts template ID and CopyTemplateRequest with custom placeholder definitions. Returns a new template object with a unique template ID. The copied template is independent and can be modified without affecting the original template.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about what 'customized placeholders' means and what the operation returns. Added clarity about request schema, that a new template ID is generated, and that the copy is independent from the original for better AI agent understanding of the operation's effects.

message: Operation 'deleteTemplate' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks critical context about permanence, impact on existing contracts, and what the response contains. Added details about irreversibility, clarification that existing contracts remain unaffected, and confirmation response to help AI agents understand the consequences before executing this destructive operation.

data.current_description: Remove a template permanently.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently removes a template from the system. The template ID and all associated metadata are deleted and cannot be recovered. Existing contracts created from this template are not affected. Returns confirmation of deletion. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical context about permanence, impact on existing contracts, and what the response contains. Added details about irreversibility, clarification that existing contracts remain unaffected, and confirmation response to help AI agents understand the consequences before executing this destructive operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve contract details including signer information and field values.

message: Operation 'withdrawContract' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains the primary effect but lacks details about side effects (signers cannot sign, no new requests can be sent) and the irreversible nature of the action. Enhanced description helps AI agents understand the consequences and determine if this operation matches their intent.

data.current_description: Prevent further signing on an active contract.
data.description_suggestion: Prevent further signing on an active contract by withdrawing it. Once withdrawn, signers can no longer sign the contract and no additional signature requests can be sent. Returns confirmation of the withdrawal action. This operation is irreversible.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains the primary effect but lacks details about side effects (signers cannot sign, no new requests can be sent) and the irreversible nature of the action. Enhanced description helps AI agents understand the consequences and determine if this operation matches their intent.

data.current_description: Dispatch or resend a signature request to a signer.
data.description_suggestion: Send or resend a signature request to a specific signer on a contract. Requires both contract ID and signer ID as path parameters. The signer receives a notification with a link to sign the document. Can be used to send initial requests or resend to signers who have not yet signed. Returns confirmation of the request dispatch.
